abort.no_compatible_transmitters: No radio frequency transmitter supports 433.42 MHz OOK transmissions. Please add a compatible transmitter first.
abort.no_transmitters: No radio frequency transmitters are available. Please set up a transmitter first.

error.invalid_address: Address must be a hexadecimal value between 000001 and FFFFFF.

data_description.address: The 24-bit hexadecimal address of the Somfy RTS remote (e.g. 1A2B3C).
data_description.transmitter: The radio frequency transmitter used to send Somfy RTS commands.
